posts.author: jnyfav (Jenny Favela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Tagging @Everyone on Item level will also notify the subitems of the parent item’s specific people column.

What are you trying to achieve

Tagging @Everyone on Item level will also notify the subitems of the parent item’s specific people column. The Item level is where we are keeping things as a high-level awareness of that particular Item topic.
